steps.title: Read the model at x = 55
steps.content: The graph uses speed on the $x$-axis and stopping distance on the $y$-axis. At $x=55$ miles per hour, the quadratic model is near $200$ feet and closest to the answer choice $210$.

steps.title: Optional Desmos regression check
steps.content: If you want a calculator check, enter representative points from the quadratic model and run a quadratic regression, then evaluate the model at $x=55$.

steps.title: Eliminate the bad choices
steps.content: Choices $25$ and $30$ are far too low for $55$ mph, and $250$ is closer to the curve near $60$ mph. The best estimate at $55$ mph is $210$, so choice C is correct.
